transcript:
CALLER: Good morning. I have to shift my appointment — doctor se milna hai but next week instead.
AGENT: Good morning! Sure. Can I get your name and which appointment you'd like to move?
CALLER: Lalita Sharma. Mera Monday ko tha... cardiology mein, Dr. Nair ke saath. 9 baje.
AGENT: Yes, I see it. Dr. Suresh Nair, Monday 9 AM. You'd like to move it to next week?
CALLER: Haan. Same time agar mile toh acha hoga.
AGENT: Dr. Nair has the same slot — 9 AM — available next Monday. Shall I book that?
CALLER: Perfect, yes please.
AGENT: All set. Your appointment is now next Monday at 9 AM with Dr. Suresh Nair, Lalita ji. SMS will follow.
CALLER: Thank you so much.
